label: 2026-04-17-chilled-lane
description: Places Frost Fern at (r2, c5) — the same column as the briarSniper attackAnchorX=679 — so the chill zone [zoneMinX=634, zoneMaxX=904] covers the sniper AND the fern itself is behind the sniper's findSniperTarget cutoff (d.x < sniperX). The chilled sniper cannot clear the Fern; thorns out-DPS the wave-3 lane-2 glassRam before it reaches the fern. Lane 4 stacks three thorns (c1/c2/c3) so the wave-3 and wave-4 glassRams hit the requiredDefendersInLane=3 threshold and take full thorn damage. Lane 0 runs two thorns (c0/c1) — under-defended vs the wave-4 ram but thorns still out-DPS it. Lanes 1 and 3 each hold with a single thorn because they only face shardMites that die in 2 shots before contact. Expected to CLEAR.

placements.note: Open with a center Thorn so the first lane-2 beetles are already under fire.
Early bank away from the center sniper lane so the first pulses arrive before wave 2.
Lane-1 Thorn before the wave-1 lane-1 shardMite can cross the wall tile (shardMite would breach at t≈17948).
Lane-3 Thorn before the wave-1 lane-3 shardMite can cross the wall tile (shardMite would breach at t≈20948).

Frost Fern at col 5 (x=679). Chill zone [zoneMinX=634, zoneMaxX=904] covers the briarSniper anchor x=679, AND the fern's x=679 is not strictly less than sniperX=679 so findSniperTarget skips it. The lane-2 sniper stays chilled (cadence 3200 → 4267ms) and cannot remove the Fern.
Lane-0 Thorn before the wave-1 lane-0 shardMite can cross the wall tile (shardMite would breach at t≈27948).

Screen the lane-4 Sunroot before the wave-2 shardMite + sniper can erase it. The Thorn also fires on the chilled briarSniper before it reaches its attackAnchorX so the sniper dies before its first shot.
Second lane-2 attacker. With fern at col 5 and two thorns in cols 0/1, the lane holds 3 combat defenders — full-damage against the wave-3 + wave-4 glassRams (requiredDefendersInLane=3).
Lane-0 reinforce before the wave-4 glassRam at offset 2500 arrives. Two thorns are under-defended against the ram but combined DPS kills it before it reaches r0c0 breach.
Earlier lane-4 depth so the wave-3 lane-4 briarSniper at offset 5500 (t=49500) dies to two thorns before its first shot.

Third lane-4 combat defender — hits the glassRam requiredDefendersInLane=3 threshold so the wave-3 ram at offset 13500 (t=57500) and the wave-4 ram at offset 4000 (t=70000) take full thorn damage and die well before contact.

Lane-2 piercing follow-up before the wave-4 glassRam at offset 14500 (t=80500). Row 2 now has 4 combat defenders (c0 Thorn, c1 Thorn, c4 Spear, c5 Fern); the chilled ram dies to combined thorn+spear damage before it crosses the fern tile.
